falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes below 4,000 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a breakdown in key support levels, contradicting the pattern's implied bullish reversal and invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 70 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 70 would suggest extreme volatility or momentum, directly conflicting with the current HOLD verdict and implying a potential blowoff top rather than a bottom.

falsification_conditions.condition: The pattern match percentage drops below 60% as measured by the macro engine's algorithm
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A drop below 60% similarity to the historical bottom_2024_aug pattern would invalidate the foundation of the current verdict, proving the UNKNOWN status was incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
